principle: Always add text labels to navigation icons — icon alone reduces tappable area and leaves action meaning ambiguous
explanation: X.ux|fitts_icon_label: icon_only -> small_tappable_area + ambiguous_meaning; icon+text -> larger_target + clear_affordance_before_tap; applies_to: bottom_nav + tab_bar + toolbar; NO:icon_only_bottom_navigation NO:unlabeled_action_icons eg: "bottom_nav: 4_icons_no_labels" >> "bottom_nav: icon+label_each (Home/Search/Orders/Profile)"

principle: Place confirmation dialogs and next-step actions near the element that triggered them — never force finger travel across the screen
explanation: X.ux|fitts_next_action: trigger_at_bottom -> next_action_must_be_near_bottom NOT at_top; top->bottom->top_finger_travel -> adds_time + frustration; use_bottom_sheet_or_inline_confirmation; NO:trigger_bottom_dialog_top NO:action_at_bottom_result_at_top eg: "delete_btn_bottom_right -> confirm_dialog_top_center" >> "delete_btn_bottom_right -> confirm_sheet_slides_from_bottom"
